docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEASECOMM CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT TEXIDOR, RUBEN
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: POLLAK, ROBERT LAWRENCE SUBSTITUTED FOR PETERS, MARK C AS ATTORNEY FOR LEASECOMM CORPORATION
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEASECOMM CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TEXIDOR, RUBEN $3,166.77 PRINCIPAL, $99.95 INTEREST, $94.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,360.72 ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT FILED FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEASECOMM CORPORATION
PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION, WRIT MAY ISSUE ON 10/11/00.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEASECOMM CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT TEXIDOR, RUBEN OEX HEARING SET FOR JUL-23-2002 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 612
PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT & SUB OF ATTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEASECOMM CORPORATION SERVED SEP-07-2000, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TEXIDOR, RUBEN
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEASECOMM CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT TEXIDOR, RUBEN
